Memories matching any pattern are skipped."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"profile_isolation"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"False"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable per-profile memory isolation via Mnemosyne banks. Default false for backward compatibility."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"shared_surface_path"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"data/shared/mnemosyne.db"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SQLite path for shared surface memories. Default false."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"skip_contexts"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"cron,flush,subagent,background,skill_loop"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Agent contexts where Mnemosyne should skip initialization. Comma-separated list. Defaults to 'cron,flush,subagent,background,skill_loop'. Set to empty string to enable all contexts. Also configurable via MNEMOSYNE_SKIP_CONTEXTS env var."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sync_roles"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"['user', 'assistant']"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Conversation roles to autosave in sync_turn(). List of role names: 'user', 'assistant'. Default ['user', 'assistant'] saves both. Set to ['user'] for user turns only, or [] to disable conversation autosave entirely. Does not affect explicit mnemosyne_remember calls. Identity signal capture is gated by user sync — excluding 'user' also disables identity extraction. Also configurable via MNEMOSYNE_SYNC_ROLES env var."}]]}]]}]]}],"\n","$L3","\n","$L4","\n","\n","$L5","\n"],["$L6"],"$L7"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"R1fXx0_zISQsUtYxfGXRl"}

4:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne is configured entirely through environment variables. No config files, no YAML, no JSON."}]

| Override embedding vector dimension |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_API_KEY"}]," |  | API key for cloud embedding provider |\n| false | Force cloud API mode for embeddings |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_MAX_ITEMS"}]," | 10000 | Maximum items in working memory before eviction |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_TTL_HOURS"}]," | 24 | Hours before working memory entries expire |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EP_LIMIT"}]," | 50000 | Max episodic memories returned per recall |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SLEEP_BATCH"}]," | 5000 | Batch size for sleep consolidation |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_VEC_TYPE"}]," | score weight in hybrid ranking |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_MCP_TOKEN"}]," |  | Bearer token for MCP server auth (required for remote deployment) |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_SLEEP_ENABLED"}]," | false | Enable automatic sleep consolidation (Hermes provider, default off) |\n|
